ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Patin see Dekesel, Charles Patin. A Man Without a Country (1990). according to De Rosas, `Corner, Giovan Battista`, in DBI, one of Patin`s daughter could not receive her doctorate due to the opposition of Elena Lucrezia`s father.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
